name: Scareclaw Belone
name_jp: スケアクロー・ベロネア
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) to your Main Monster Zone, adjacent to a "Scareclaw" monster you control or in its column. You can only Special Summon "Scareclaw Belone" once per turn this way. If your "Scareclaw" monster in the Extra Monster Zone attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) to your Main Monster Zone, adjacent to a "Scareclaw" monster you control or in its column. You can only Special Summon "Scareclaw Belone" once per turn this way. If your "Scareclaw" monster in the Extra Monster Zone attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) to your Main Monster Zone, adjacent to a "Scareclaw" monster you control or in its column. You can only Special Summon "Scareclaw Belone" once per turn this way. If your "Scareclaw" monster in the Extra Monster Zone attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
